mapper.sql: create_time, pack_num, bat_num, voltage, resistance, temperature, capacity, resistance_rage_slip, resistance_rate_change, swollen_voltage, leakage_status, poll_batch_no, poll_started_at

create_time = datetime(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'localtime'), voltage = excluded.voltage, resistance = excluded.resistance, temperature = excluded.temperature, capacity = excluded.capacity, resistance_rage_slip = excluded.resistance_rage_slip, resistance_rate_change = excluded.resistance_rate_change, swollen_voltage = excluded.swollen_voltage, leakage_status = excluded.leakage_status, poll_batch_no = excluded.poll_batch_no, poll_started_at = excluded.poll_started_at

create_time = datetime(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'localtime'), pack_voltage = coalesce(excluded.pack_voltage, battery_module_group_realtime.pack_voltage), pack_current = coalesce(excluded.pack_current, battery_module_group_realtime.pack_current), battery_pack_float_current = coalesce(excluded.battery_pack_float_current, battery_module_group_realtime.battery_pack_float_current), battery_pack_outer_voltage = coalesce(excluded.battery_pack_outer_voltage, battery_module_group_realtime.battery_pack_outer_voltage), environment_temperature1 = coalesce(excluded.environment_temperature1, battery_module_group_realtime.environment_temperature1), environment_temperature2 = coalesce(excluded.environment_temperature2, battery_module_group_realtime.environment_temperature2), charge_discharge_current = coalesce(excluded.charge_discharge_current, battery_module_group_realtime.charge_discharge_current), float_current = coalesce(excluded.float_current, battery_module_group_realtime.float_current), external_voltage = coalesce(excluded.external_voltage, battery_module_group_realtime.external_voltage), latest_group_update_time = case when excluded.group_module_fresh = 1 then excluded.latest_group_update_time else battery_module_group_realtime.latest_group_update_time end, group_module_fresh = excluded.group_module_fresh, poll_batch_no = excluded.poll_batch_no, poll_started_at = excluded.poll_started_at
mapper.insert:
insert into battery_module_cell_realtime (
) values ( datetime(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'localtime'), #{packNum}, #{batNum}, #{voltage}, #{resistance}, #{temperature}, #{capacity}, #{resistanceRageSlip}, #{resistanceRateChange}, #{swollenVoltage}, #{leakageStatus}, #{pollBatchNo}, #{pollStartedAt} ) on conflict(pack_num, bat_num) do update set

insert into battery_module_cell_realtime (
) values
( datetime(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'localtime'), #{cell.packNum}, #{cell.batNum}, #{cell.voltage}, #{cell.resistance}, #{cell.temperature}, #{cell.capacity}, #{cell.resistanceRageSlip}, #{cell.resistanceRateChange}, #{cell.swollenVoltage}, #{cell.leakageStatus}, #{cell.pollBatchNo}, #{cell.pollStartedAt} )
on conflict(pack_num, bat_num) do update set

insert into battery_module_group_realtime ( create_time, pack_num, pack_voltage, pack_current, battery_pack_float_current, battery_pack_outer_voltage, environment_temperature1, environment_temperature2, charge_discharge_current, float_current, external_voltage, latest_group_update_time, group_module_fresh, poll_batch_no, poll_started_at ) values ( datetime(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'localtime'), #{packNum}, #{packVoltage}, #{packCurrent}, #{batteryPackFloatCurrent}, #{batteryPackOuterVoltage}, #{environmentTemperature1}, #{environmentTemperature2}, #{chargeDischargeCurrent}, #{floatCurrent}, #{externalVoltage}, case when #{groupModuleFresh} = 1 then datetime(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'localtime') else null end, #{groupModuleFresh}, #{pollBatchNo}, #{pollStartedAt} ) on conflict(pack_num) do update set

insert into battery_module_group_realtime ( create_time, pack_num, pack_voltage, pack_current, battery_pack_float_current, battery_pack_outer_voltage, environment_temperature1, environment_temperature2, charge_discharge_current, float_current, external_voltage, latest_group_update_time, group_module_fresh, poll_batch_no, poll_started_at ) values
( datetime(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'localtime'), #{group.packNum}, #{group.packVoltage}, #{group.packCurrent}, #{group.batteryPackFloatCurrent}, #{group.batteryPackOuterVoltage}, #{group.environmentTemperature1}, #{group.environmentTemperature2}, #{group.chargeDischargeCurrent}, #{group.floatCurrent}, #{group.externalVoltage}, case when #{group.groupModuleFresh} = 1 then datetime(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'localtime') else null end, #{group.groupModuleFresh}, #{group.pollBatchNo}, #{group.pollStartedAt} )
on conflict(pack_num) do update set
mapper.sql: id, create_time as createTime, pack_num as packNum, bat_num as batNum, voltage, resistance, temperature, capacity, resistance_rage_slip as resistanceRageSlip, resistance_rate_change as resistanceRateChange, swollen_voltage as swollenVoltage, leakage_status as leakageStatus, poll_batch_no as pollBatchNo, poll_started_at as pollStartedAt
mapper.select:
select
from battery_module_cell_realtime where pack_num = #{packNum} order by bat_num

select id, create_time as createTime, pack_num as packNum, pack_voltage as packVoltage, pack_current as packCurrent, battery_pack_float_current as batteryPackFloatCurrent, battery_pack_outer_voltage as batteryPackOuterVoltage, environment_temperature1 as environmentTemperature1, environment_temperature2 as environmentTemperature2, charge_discharge_current as chargeDischargeCurrent, float_current as floatCurrent, external_voltage as externalVoltage, cell_count as cellCount, online_cell_count as onlineCellCount, stale_cell_count as staleCellCount, data_fresh as dataFresh, max_voltage_bat_num as maxVoltageBatNum, max_cell_voltage as maxCellVoltage, min_voltage_bat_num as minVoltageBatNum, min_cell_voltage as minCellVoltage, avg_cell_voltage as avgCellVoltage, voltage_range as voltageRange, max_temperature_bat_num as maxTemperatureBatNum, max_cell_temperature as maxCellTemperature, min_temperature_bat_num as minTemperatureBatNum, min_cell_temperature as minCellTemperature, avg_cell_temperature as avgCellTemperature, temperature_range as temperatureRange, max_resistance_bat_num as maxResistanceBatNum, max_internal_resistance as maxInternalResistance, min_resistance_bat_num as minResistanceBatNum, min_internal_resistance as minInternalResistance, avg_internal_resistance as avgInternalResistance, resistance_range as resistanceRange, battery_pack_soc as batteryPackSoc, battery_pack_soh as batteryPackSoh, battery_pack_status as batteryPackStatus, bcapacity, capacity, backup_duration as backupDuration, dis_charge_capacity as disChargeCapacity, dis_charge_duration as disChargeDuration, battery_avg_temperature as batteryAvgTemperature, battery_voltage_deviation as batteryVoltageDeviation, battery_voltage_range as batteryVoltageRange, residual_discharge_duration as residualDischargeDuration, ripple_voltage as rippleVoltage, hydrogen_concentration as hydrogenConcentration, positive_insulation_resistance as positiveInsulationResistance, negative_insulation_resistance as negativeInsulationResistance, grounding_battery_upper_limit as groundingBatteryUpperLimit, grounding_battery_lower_limit as groundingBatteryLowerLimit, max_resistance_rate_change_bat_num as maxResistanceRateChangeBatNum, max_resistance_rate_change as maxResistanceRateChange, resistance_test_status as resistanceTestStatus, device_work_status as deviceWorkStatus, device_work_io_status as deviceWorkIoStatus, latest_cell_update_time as latestCellUpdateTime, latest_group_update_time as latestGroupUpdateTime, group_module_fresh as groupModuleFresh, poll_batch_no as pollBatchNo, poll_started_at as pollStartedAt from battery_module_group_realtime where pack_num = #{batteryGroup} limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into battery_module_group_realtime ( create_time, pack_num, cell_count, online_cell_count, stale_cell_count, data_fresh, max_voltage_bat_num, max_cell_voltage, min_voltage_bat_num, min_cell_voltage, avg_cell_voltage, voltage_range, max_temperature_bat_num, max_cell_temperature, min_temperature_bat_num, min_cell_temperature, avg_cell_temperature, temperature_range, max_resistance_bat_num, max_internal_resistance, min_resistance_bat_num, min_internal_resistance, avg_internal_resistance, resistance_range, battery_pack_soc, battery_pack_soh, battery_pack_status, bcapacity, capacity, backup_duration, dis_charge_capacity, dis_charge_duration, battery_avg_temperature, battery_voltage_deviation, battery_voltage_range, residual_discharge_duration, ripple_voltage, hydrogen_concentration, positive_insulation_resistance, negative_insulation_resistance, grounding_battery_upper_limit, grounding_battery_lower_limit, max_resistance_rate_change_bat_num, max_resistance_rate_change, resistance_test_status, device_work_status, device_work_io_status, latest_cell_update_time, latest_group_update_time, group_module_fresh, poll_batch_no, poll_started_at ) values ( datetime(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'localtime'), #{packNum}, #{cellCount}, #{onlineCellCount}, #{staleCellCount}, #{dataFresh}, #{maxVoltageBatNum}, #{maxCellVoltage}, #{minVoltageBatNum}, #{minCellVoltage}, #{avgCellVoltage}, #{voltageRange}, #{maxTemperatureBatNum}, #{maxCellTemperature}, #{minTemperatureBatNum}, #{minCellTemperature}, #{avgCellTemperature}, #{temperatureRange}, #{maxResistanceBatNum}, #{maxInternalResistance}, #{minResistanceBatNum}, #{minInternalResistance}, #{avgInternalResistance}, #{resistanceRange}, #{batteryPackSoc}, #{batteryPackSoh}, #{batteryPackStatus}, #{bcapacity}, #{capacity}, #{backupDuration}, #{disChargeCapacity}, #{disChargeDuration}, #{batteryAvgTemperature}, #{batteryVoltageDeviation}, #{batteryVoltageRange}, #{residualDischargeDuration}, #{rippleVoltage}, #{hydrogenConcentration}, #{positiveInsulationResistance}, #{negativeInsulationResistance}, #{groundingBatteryUpperLimit}, #{groundingBatteryLowerLimit}, #{maxResistanceRateChangeBatNum}, #{maxResistanceRateChange}, #{resistanceTestStatus}, #{deviceWorkStatus}, #{deviceWorkIoStatus}, #{latestCellUpdateTime}, #{latestGroupUpdateTime}, #{groupModuleFresh}, #{pollBatchNo}, #{pollStartedAt} ) on conflict(pack_num) do update set create_time = datetime(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'localtime'), cell_count = excluded.cell_count, online_cell_count = excluded.online_cell_count, stale_cell_count = excluded.stale_cell_count, data_fresh = excluded.data_fresh, max_voltage_bat_num = excluded.max_voltage_bat_num, max_cell_voltage = excluded.max_cell_voltage, min_voltage_bat_num = excluded.min_voltage_bat_num, min_cell_voltage = excluded.min_cell_voltage, avg_cell_voltage = excluded.avg_cell_voltage, voltage_range = excluded.voltage_range, max_temperature_bat_num = excluded.max_temperature_bat_num, max_cell_temperature = excluded.max_cell_temperature, min_temperature_bat_num = excluded.min_temperature_bat_num, min_cell_temperature = excluded.min_cell_temperature, avg_cell_temperature = excluded.avg_cell_temperature, temperature_range = excluded.temperature_range, max_resistance_bat_num = excluded.max_resistance_bat_num, max_internal_resistance = excluded.max_internal_resistance, min_resistance_bat_num = excluded.min_resistance_bat_num, min_internal_resistance = excluded.min_internal_resistance, avg_internal_resistance = excluded.avg_internal_resistance, resistance_range = excluded.resistance_range, battery_pack_soc = excluded.battery_pack_soc, battery_pack_soh = excluded.battery_pack_soh, battery_pack_status = excluded.battery_pack_status, bcapacity = excluded.bcapacity, capacity = excluded.capacity, backup_duration = excluded.backup_duration, dis_charge_capacity = excluded.dis_charge_capacity, dis_charge_duration = excluded.dis_charge_duration, battery_avg_temperature = excluded.battery_avg_temperature, battery_voltage_deviation = excluded.battery_voltage_deviation, battery_voltage_range = excluded.battery_voltage_range, residual_discharge_duration = excluded.residual_discharge_duration, ripple_voltage = excluded.ripple_voltage, hydrogen_concentration = excluded.hydrogen_concentration, positive_insulation_resistance = excluded.positive_insulation_resistance, negative_insulation_resistance = excluded.negative_insulation_resistance, grounding_battery_upper_limit = excluded.grounding_battery_upper_limit, grounding_battery_lower_limit = excluded.grounding_battery_lower_limit, max_resistance_rate_change_bat_num = excluded.max_resistance_rate_change_bat_num, max_resistance_rate_change = excluded.max_resistance_rate_change, resistance_test_status = excluded.resistance_test_status, device_work_status = excluded.device_work_status, device_work_io_status = excluded.device_work_io_status, latest_cell_update_time = excluded.latest_cell_update_time, latest_group_update_time = excluded.latest_group_update_time, group_module_fresh = excluded.group_module_fresh, poll_batch_no = excluded.poll_batch_no, poll_started_at = excluded.poll_started_at
